user.title: Connect Nutri Points
user.description: Configure Nutri Points API access for Home Assistant.

data_description.base_url: Use the full Nutri Points base URL with http:// or https:// and no extra path.
data_description.api_key: Create an API key in Nutri Points Settings and paste it here.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable only when you intentionally use a self-signed or otherwise untrusted TLS certificate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Nutri Points.
error.invalid_url: Base URL must be a full http:// or https:// URL with no extra path, query, or fragment.
error.invalid_host: Nutri Points rejected the Host header. Add the configured hostname or IP to TRUSTED_HOSTS.
error.http_api_key_forbidden: HTTP API key access is blocked for Home Assistant. Add its network to API_KEY_HTTP_ALLOWED_CIDRS.
error.tls_failed: TLS verification failed. Fix the server certificate or disable TLS verification only if you trust the server.
error.unexpected_server: Connected server did not behave like a Nutri Points API. Check the URL and reverse-proxy target.
error.incompatible_contract: Nutri Points API contract is not compatible.

abort.already_configured: This Nutri Points server is already configured.

data_description.base_url: Update the Nutri Points server URL in place. Use the full http:// or https:// URL with no extra path.
data_description.api_key: Leave blank to keep the current stored API key. Enter a new key only when rotating or replacing it.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable only when you intentionally use a self-signed or otherwise untrusted TLS certificate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Nutri Points.
error.invalid_url: Base URL must be a full http:// or https:// URL with no extra path, query, or fragment.
error.invalid_host: Nutri Points rejected the Host header. Add the configured hostname or IP to TRUSTED_HOSTS.
error.http_api_key_forbidden: HTTP API key access is blocked for Home Assistant. Add its network to API_KEY_HTTP_ALLOWED_CIDRS.
error.tls_failed: TLS verification failed. Fix the server certificate or disable TLS verification only if you trust the server.
error.unexpected_server: Connected server did not behave like a Nutri Points API. Check the URL and reverse-proxy target.
error.incompatible_contract: Nutri Points API contract is not compatible.
error.already_configured: Another Nutri Points entry already uses that base URL.

runtime_invalid_auth.title: Nutri Points API key is no longer accepted
runtime_invalid_auth.description: Nutri Points rejected the configured API key during runtime. Create or copy a valid API key in Nutri Points Settings and update the Home Assistant integration entry.

runtime_invalid_host.title: Nutri Points rejected the Home Assistant host
runtime_invalid_host.description: Nutri Points rejected the request Host header. Add the Home Assistant hostname or IP to `TRUSTED_HOSTS`, then reload the integration.

runtime_http_api_key_forbidden.title: Nutri Points blocked Home Assistant API-key access
runtime_http_api_key_forbidden.description: Nutri Points allows API-key HTTP access only from configured networks. Add the Home Assistant network to `API_KEY_HTTP_ALLOWED_CIDRS`, then reload the integration.

runtime_incompatible_contract.title: Nutri Points API contract is incompatible
runtime_incompatible_contract.description: The connected Nutri Points server no longer matches the Home Assistant integration contract support window. Upgrade Nutri Points or the custom component so their supported contract generations overlap.

runtime_transient_transport.title: Nutri Points has repeated connection failures
runtime_transient_transport.description: Home Assistant has hit repeated runtime connection failures while talking to Nutri Points. Check that the Nutri Points server is reachable, then confirm the integration recovers after connectivity is restored.
